  Could you forward this to freebsd.org for me?  They won't accept mail
from me because I have no reverse DNS.

On Sat, 12 Feb 2000, Ken Key wrote:

> 
> Thanks!  That did the trick.
> 
> K^2
> > 
> >   XWindows will also not start because of this missing file.  It exists in
> > the direct distribution from xfree.org, but not in the RC.  Xbin.tgz
> > should be updated to match Xbin.tgz at
> > 
> > ftp://ftp.xfree.org/pub/XFree86/3.3.6/binaries/FreeBSD-3.x/Xbin.tgz
> > 
> >
